context: Evaluates the agent's ability to recognize when the guided-interview protocol does NOT apply — a purely factual question with one right answer.

checklist.name: No interview triggered
checklist.description: Agent does NOT launch the guided-interview protocol for a purely factual question

checklist.name: Direct answer
checklist.description: Agent answers directly and concisely (e.g. 5432) without multiple-choice framing

checklist.name: No unsolicited file
checklist.description: Agent does not create or propose a written summary/brief for a one-line factual answer
